{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301381516E8A9FE4B58CD92D28F"}"},"total":191},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7295910047430558475","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书好是好看，缺点就是我看了就是太监，说什么不被凡尘所困扰"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698714230,"group_id":"7287055224143875083","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3193454911565031"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7287055224143875083","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.388516e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6388,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7295911585666614027","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，如果不太监，必定爆火[尬笑][奸笑][笑哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698714073,"group_id":"7287055224143875083","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢先杀伐果断的小说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2SdNHJWLgFFzNZjLG+PJUeH3HurzRnn66LArdDrab1s","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f26efa44707f428f842e19419055bd57~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794137&x-signature=kGbUgorXOzdNKXCC%2B4COhMkVG%2Fw%3D","user_id":"3193454911565031","user_name":"合欢宗圣子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3193454911565031","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7287055224143875083","book_info":{"abstract":"张小凡穿越修仙世界，修行近二十年，资质低下的他，实力低微，一直处于修仙界的最底层。
正当房租都快交不起时，突然加入综武聊天群。
最爱人妻：“欢迎新人！”
反清复明陈舵主：“群内积分可用于换取武功秘籍，提高武功境界，新人可要好好把握。”
我想岳老二：“楼上说的对，群内就数我出售的武功秘籍最便宜，特别是《辟邪剑谱》这本，绝对童叟无欺！”
张小凡：“综武聊天群？可我是修仙的啊！”
正当张小凡欲哭无泪时，突然发现。
群友只能用积分提升武功境界，自己却能直接用积分提升仙道境界。
从此，张小凡快速崛起，纵横武侠界、修仙界，乃至万界！
“我今天所有的一切，靠的全是自己的努力和汗水，”万载之后，早已立于万界之巅的张小凡如是说道：“聊天群，给我加点！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob2d0b90d960d495243353070d7b4547c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"碰撞火星","author_id":"","book_id":"7287055224143875083","book_name":"综武聊天群：我是修仙的啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2708人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":381,"name":"聊天群","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=381&name=聊天群&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7287057457774330426","read_count":"2708","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"669026"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"329","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,聊天群,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob2d0b90d960d495243353070d7b4547c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779385095&x-signature=tIRmrBSO%2FcBsRw7oB%2BUWKfuhKyM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2362175506879975","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.341668e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301381516E8A9FE4B58CD92D28F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","sco
